reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar familiar tranquilo y excelente atencion ideal para los viajeros de paso por la ciudad

(Translated by Google)
A very nice, quiet, family-friendly place with excellent service, ideal for travelers passing through the city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpdnEtczJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, platos abundantes, buen precio y si sos socio del ACÁ un descuento extra, nosotros vamos seguido ya que  si tenes nenes se entretienen en el salón de juegos. El amigo leo un genio

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, generous portions, good prices, and if you're an ACÁ member you get an extra discount. We go often because if you have kids, they'll be entertained in the playroom. Leo is a genius.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyM0xqaVN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo. Atención excelente. Gran restaurante. Ideal para familias. El restaurante es buenísimo y muy buen precio.Paramos ahi desde el 2008. Jamas un problema!

(Translated by Google)
Very nice. Excellent service. Great restaurant. Ideal for families. The restaurant is fantastic and very reasonably priced. We've been going there since 2008. Never a problem!

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, los playeros muy cordiales, rápidos y atentos!! Que suerte que abrieron una sucursal con tal seriedad en la zona, ya se hacía necesario.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the staff were very friendly, quick, and attentive! It's great that they opened a branch with such professionalism in the area; it was long overdue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyN0tPMTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, la comida muy buena y abundante.Un lugar familiar donde ademas de comer si tenes niños se pueden entretener en la sala de juego.
En cuanto al.hotel las habitaciones son modernas y se encuentra cerca del centro de santa rosa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the food was very good and plentiful. A family-friendly place where, in addition to eating, children can be entertained in the playroom.

As for the hotel, the rooms are modern and it's located near the center of Santa Rosa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyN0oyZmZBEAE
